title: Grammitis duriuscula
taxonomy: Grammitis duriuscula is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Grammitis, which consists of small, terrestrial ferns. Grammitis duriuscula is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of this species is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, and class Polypodiopsida. Further research may be needed to determine the exact classification within the family Polypodiaceae.

intro: Grammitis duriuscula, also known as Durisscula fern or Grammitis fern, is a species of plant in the family Polypodiaceae, characterized by its delicate fronds and creeping rhizome.
